rules.action: Wait for Google Basic Access review (Google Ads API application submitted)
Do nothing unless owner intentionally wants to activate Meta spend
Connect SMTP, SendGrid, or Twilio before enabling CRM sending
Wait for first real paid order before ROI optimization
Amazon developer profile submitted and under review; wait for approval before collecting AMAZON_REFRESH_TOKEN and AMAZON_SELLER_ID

safe_mode_principle: No live spending, no customer messages, no supplier payments without explicit owner confirmation.
